blocks.note: counter-contract deploy and AVAX transfer under dynamic fees
single atomic import of AVAX (pre-AP5 extData encoding)
atomic import of a non-AVAX asset, funding a multicoin (ANT) balance
nativeAssetCall moving the imported ANT balance (functional precompile era)
atomic export of AVAX with AP4 header fields (extDataGasUsed, blockGasCost)
two atomic imports batched into one block (post-AP5 extData encoding)
nativeAssetCall against the deprecated precompile (failing receipt)
nativeAssetCall functional again after AP6 re-enablement
atomic AVAX export under Banff's AVAX-only restriction
counter increment under Cortina's 15M gas limit
sendWarpMessage precompile call emitting an unsigned warp message
getVerifiedWarpMessage with an access-list predicate (results in header extra), plus a transfer whose tracing replays the predicate transaction
dynamic-fee transfer with Cancun header fields (blobGasUsed, excessBlobGas, parentBeaconRoot)
dynamic-fee transfer with the ACP-176 fee state as the extra-data prefix
first Granite block (timeMilliseconds, minDelayExcess header fields)
second Granite block, subject to the ACP-226 minimum block delay; three transactions so that tracing the last replays the first two
storage set-and-clear in one transaction, accruing an SSTORE refund that coreth discards (refunds disabled since AP1)
